prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 86.3 kg; Height 171.9 cm; BMI 29.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 233mg/dL; 9 months ago 180mg/dL; 6 months ago 207mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.9kg; 9 months ago 84.7kg; 6 months ago 88.2kg; 3 months ago 85.7kg; current 86.3kg), Height (12 months ago 171.9cm; 9 months ago 171.9cm; 6 months ago 171.9cm; 3 months ago 171.9cm; current 171.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 62U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 97U/L; 9 months ago 104U/L; 6 months ago 103U/L; 3 months ago 96U/L; current 100U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 286mg/g; 9 months ago 263mg/g; 6 months ago 332mg/g; 3 months ago 310mg/g; current 267mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 135mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
